name: mf2-app
description: Application-like MF2 messages for throughput measurements.

cases.description: Local declaration used in an application greeting.

cases.source: An article body paragraph showing the parser on a long text run. Translators usually produce sentences far longer than placeholder-only snippets, so a realistic application corpus needs at least one entry whose bulk is plain text. The parser walks until the next delimiter — here only a final period stops the run after the body finishes. Welcome, {$reader}, and enjoy the rest of the post.
cases.description: Long single-line app body with one trailing placeholder (text-run heavy).
